painting.description: General miniature painting content, tips, and techniques.

glazing.description: Glazing technique for smooth color transitions using thin, transparent paint layers.

dry-brushing.description: Dry brushing technique for quick highlights using minimal paint on a dry brush.

airbrushing.description: Airbrush painting techniques for smooth gradients, zenithal priming, and basecoating.

nmm.description: Non-Metallic Metal technique - painting metallic effects using regular paints without metallics.

contrast-paints.description: Using contrast and speedpaints for quick shading and highlighting in one coat.

basing.description: Miniature base decoration techniques including texture, grass, rocks, and scenic elements.

weathering.description: Weathering techniques for adding wear, damage, and environmental effects to models.

rust-effects.description: Creating realistic rust and corrosion effects on miniatures and terrain.

snow-effects.description: Adding snow and winter effects to bases and models.

orc-skin.description: Painting green orc and ork flesh tones with various recipes and techniques.

pale-flesh.description: Painting pale, undead, or sickly skin tones on miniatures.

goblin-skin.description: Painting goblin flesh - typically lighter or yellower greens than orcs.

preshading.description: Preshading technique - applying shadows before basecoats for depth.

zenithal.description: Zenithal priming technique - black primer with white from above for natural lighting.

edge-highlighting.description: Edge highlighting technique for crisp highlights on armor edges and raised details.

blending.description: Wet blending and layering techniques for smooth color gradients.

washes.description: Using washes and shades for quick shading in recesses.

speed-painting.description: Fast painting techniques to get armies table-ready quickly.

skin-tones.description: Painting human and humanoid flesh tones.

leather.description: Painting realistic leather textures on belts, pouches, and armor.

cloth.description: Painting fabric and cloth materials on miniatures.

wood.description: Painting wood grain and wooden surfaces.

metal.description: Painting metallic surfaces using metallic paints or NMM.

eyes.description: Painting eyes and faces on miniatures.

resin-casting.description: Casting miniatures and bases using silicone molds and resin.

kitbashing.description: Converting and combining parts from different kits to create unique models.

priming.description: Priming miniatures with spray or brush-on primer before painting.
